description: Use this API to print the active Slider diagram in the GUI. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.3.0. printdiagfile_2(pagesetup, viewsetup, sdev, filename)

parameters.name: pagesetup
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying print options. (input).

parameters.name: viewsetup
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying view setup options. (input).

parameters.name: sdev
parameters.description: Name of valid attached windows printer. (input).

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Name of a file to save the print to, if printing to a file.this parameter is not written out during the recording of the api from the psse gui due to dependencies on the print device. (input).

pagesetup.description: number of copies to print (1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘copies’.
orientation (1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘orient’.

viewsetup.description: left extent of view to print, can also be specified with keyword ‘xmin’.
bottom extent of view to print, can also be specified with keyword ‘ymin’.
right extent of view to print, can also be specified with keyword ‘xmax’.
top extent of view to print, can also be specified with keyword ‘ymax’.
scale to print view at, 0.0 to fit view extents to a single page (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘scale’.
